title: LLM
content_html:
LLM Integration

This section describes calling LLM API to support tagging and scoring decisions.

Documents

  • LLM-Assisted Dimension Recommendation captures the current conceptual dimension/tag recommendation notes.
  • LLM Semantic Enrichment Spec defines the shared planning direction across tagging, dimensions, Library summaries, and structure review.
  • Generic LLM Helper Pattern defines the reusable structured invocation pattern.
